creator: ashish@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

Thanks for reporting the bug, but I'm not able to reproduce it in my poudriere instance:

https://people.freebsd.org/~ashish/logs/dino-0.3.1.log.gz (compressed)

The code-path in the question should not be hit unless the option ICE is set.

Could you please share the output of:

1. pkg info -oa

2. make -C /usr/ports/net-im/dino showconfig

3. make -C /usr/ports/net-im/dino -V CMAKE_ARGS

Thanks!
